history.statement: Consumer businesses should keep delivering double-digit growth into the next quarter.
history.actual_text: Reported consumer-facing revenue growth remained above 10% in the following quarter.

history.statement: Refining margins should improve sequentially as the operating environment normalizes.
history.actual_text: Refining margin compressed sequentially instead of improving.

history.statement: Telecom subscriber monetization should remain steady through the next reporting period.
history.actual_text: ARPU improved modestly, supporting the guidance.
